_comment: Phrasing templates for the Announcements feature. See dev/announcements.md §3.
Each bucket has a `balanced` list (always present, used by Balanced verbosity)
and an optional `chatty` list (longer / more conversational variants used when
the user picks Chatty). Minimal verbosity bypasses these templates and speaks
just `{name}.` directly. Translators rewrite natively, not literally.

chatty: There's a {name} calling — first one this session.
That's a {name}, nice and clear.
Definitely a {name} in there.
Picked up a {name}, good signal.
The {name} is back, second time now.
Here's that {name} again.
{name} keeps showing up.
The {name} is keeping at it.
Still going, that {name}.
{name} is on a roll.

balanced: That looks like a {name} to me.
chatty: I'm pretty sure that's a {name}, though I wouldn't bet the farm.
Sounds like a {name} to me.
Could call that a {name}, fairly confident.
Might be the {name} returning, hard to say.
Sounds like the {name} could be back.

balanced: I'm not sure, but this might be a {name}.
Hard to tell, but maybe a {name}.
For a brief moment that sounded like a {name}.
chatty: Not at all sure, but for a moment that sounded like a {name}.
Hard to tell — could have been a {name}.
Might have been a {name}, I wouldn't swear to it.

balanced: Maybe the {name} again, hard to tell.
chatty: Maybe the {name} again, but the signal's marginal.
Could be the {name} once more, hard to tell.
Quite a chorus — {name1}, {name2}, and {name3} all at once.
Three at once: {name1}, {name2}, and a {name3}.

balanced: Lots happening: {name1}, {name2}, {name3}, and a few more.
chatty: Lots going on right now — {name1}, {name2}, {name3}, and several more.
Busy moment — {name1}, {name2}, {name3}, and a handful of others.
